creator: niels@kobschaetzki.net
text:
I am not sure. I have not seen it yet so far but I also know the workaround.
Since this bug report is already more than a year old, I can only imagine that the problem was that "dovecot" was locked, and dovecot22 was more or less dovecot but a renamed package and that this triggered the problem. I have currently no idea how to trigger this behavior. A year ago I might have been able to but now, I don't.
